tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.0%), indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control and possible prediabetes or early diabetes. Renal function, electrolytes, and glucose are normal. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of glycemic management or monitoring.

text.div: Provider Organization: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

name.value: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
